title: Engraving Table
description: Adds a new block to the game, with which you can craft all the vanilla music discs, as well as a couple of new items that you will need to do this.
body:
Adds a new block to the game, with which you can craft all the vanilla music discs, as well as a couple of new items that you will need to do this.

If necessary, you can configure the possible pool of output items, the amount of fragments spent on the chance to create a disk, as well as the chance itself. By default, the chance is 20%
